summary: Mature codebase with good test coverage (99.79% pass rate). Main issues: type safety (55 files with 'any'), 60 TODO/FIXME markers, and some architectural complexity in hooks system.

critical_debt.title: Type Safety - Excessive 'any' usage
critical_debt.impact: Runtime errors, poor IDE support, maintenance difficulty
critical_debt.approach: Gradual migration: tools/ → hooks/ → features/. Use strict TypeScript, add proper interfaces.

high_debt.title: Hook System Complexity
high_debt.impact: Hard to maintain, security-critical code is complex
high_debt.approach: Split into: validation.ts, normalization.ts, security.ts. Extract SENSITIVE_HOOKS config.

high_debt.title: 60 TODO/FIXME markers
high_debt.approach: Triage: convert to issues (30%), fix immediately (20%), delete stale (50%).

high_debt.title: MCP Integration Complexity
high_debt.impact: 3 test failures in MCP bridge, hard to debug
high_debt.approach: Consolidate client logic, add integration tests, document error handling.

medium_debt.title: Inconsistent Error Handling
medium_debt.approach: Standardize: use Result<T, E> pattern or custom error classes.

medium_debt.title: Large Config Objects
medium_debt.impact: Hard to navigate, prone to typos
medium_debt.approach: Use TypeScript const assertions, split into domain-specific configs.

low_debt.title: Inconsistent Naming
low_debt.location: src/hooks/ (some use index.ts, others use main file name)
low_debt.approach: Standardize on index.ts for public API, named files for internals.

quick_wins.title: Fix MCP Bridge Test Failures
quick_wins.approach: Debug 3 failing tests in src/compatibility/mcp-bridge.ts, likely async timing issues.

quick_wins.title: Add Type Guards for Hook Inputs
quick_wins.approach: Add isValidHookInput() guards in bridge-normalize.ts, replace 5 'any' casts.

quick_wins.title: Extract Test Utilities
quick_wins.approach: Create tests/helpers/ with createMockHookInput(), setupTestEnv(). Refactor 20 test files.
quick_wins.roi: 5x - saves 15 min per test file edit

tasks: Fix MCP bridge test failures (C1 quick win)
Add type guards for hook inputs (C2 quick win)
Triage and close 30 stale TODO comments
refactoring_roadmap.outcome: 99.99% test pass rate, reduced 'any' usage by 10%

tasks: Add proper interfaces for all hook types
refactoring_roadmap.outcome: 50% reduction in 'any' usage, better IDE support

next_sprint: Reduce 'any' usage in src/tools/ and src/hooks/
